title: Fix YouTube channel connection functionality

requirements.text: Debug and fix the YouTube channel connection flow in the ChannelConnection component (frontend/src/components/ChannelConnection.tsx) to identify why the OAuth connection process is not working as expected, ensuring users can successfully connect their YouTube channels
acceptanceCriteria: The 'Connect YouTube Channel' button triggers the OAuth flow without errors
Users can successfully authenticate with YouTube
Connection status displays correctly after successful authentication
Error messages are shown clearly if connection fails

requirements.text: Verify and fix the useYouTubeChannel hook (frontend/src/hooks/useYouTubeChannel.ts) to ensure it correctly handles the YouTube OAuth flow, manages connection state, and communicates with the backend channel connection methods
acceptanceCriteria: The hook successfully initiates OAuth connection flow
Connection status is retrieved and updated correctly
Loading and error states are handled properly
React Query cache invalidation works after connection/disconnection

requirements.text: Review and fix the backend YouTube channel OAuth storage method in backend/main.mo to ensure it correctly stores and retrieves channel credentials associated with user profiles
acceptanceCriteria: OAuth credentials are stored securely per user profile
Channel connection status can be queried successfully
Credentials persist across canister upgrades via migration

requirements.text: Add comprehensive error logging throughout the YouTube connection flow in both frontend (ChannelConnection component and useYouTubeChannel hook) and backend (OAuth storage method) to output detailed debugging information including OAuth callback responses, credential storage results, and any failure points
acceptanceCriteria: Frontend logs show OAuth initiation, callback handling, and response data
Backend logs show credential storage attempts and results
Error messages are descriptive and actionable
Console logs help identify the exact failure point in the connection flow

constraints: Do not modify immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
Maintain single-actor backend architecture with all logic in backend/main.mo
Use React Query for all backend data fetching and mutations
Preserve existing YouTube OAuth integration patterns from Version 47
nonGoals: Implementing features from Version 46 (admin panel enhancements) - will be addressed separately
Fixing clip isolation issues (clips showing on other accounts) - will be addressed separately
Adding new YouTube features beyond fixing the existing connection flow
